text:
The CTA Structure refers to the effectiveness and organization of your Calls to Action (CTAs) on your website. CTAs are prompts that encourage users to take specific actions, such as signing up for a newsletter, making a purchase, or downloading a resource. 

A score of 42/100 in this area indicates that there are opportunities to improve how your CTAs are presented and utilized on your site. This could involve optimizing their placement, design, wording, or overall strategy to make them more compelling and effective in driving user engagement.

Improving your CTA Structure can lead to better user interaction and potentially higher conversion rates. Would you like to explore specific recommendations for enhancing your CTAs?
